name: Self-Enshrouded Recluse
description: The provided Shield Effect increases by 10%. Increases the Shield Effect provided by the wearer by 12%. When an ally target holds a Shield provided by the wearer, the ally target's CRIT DMG increases by 15%.

pieces2.description: The provided Shield Effect increases by 10%.

pieces4.description: Increases the Shield Effect provided by the wearer by 12%. When an ally target holds a Shield provided by the wearer, the ally target's CRIT DMG increases by 15%.
